title: KQOffice AI Provider Runtime Evidence Envelope
description: Envelope written by kqoffice::ai::EvidenceRecorder for every Provider::call() invocation. Distinct from evidence-record.schema.json (which is the m3-02 capability/diagnostic fixture-validator record). The provider-runtime envelope is per-call audit trail covering: which service mode handled the request, which provider/model, request/response sizes, duration, and the canonical status token (including the apply-plan-* tokens emitted when ApplyPlanValidator rejects a payload).

evidence_id.description: Per-process unique id minted by EvidenceRecorder. Format: ev-<hex16> with timestamp + monotonic counter components.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp with seconds precision and 'Z' suffix.

service_mode.description: Active ServiceModePolicy mode at the time of the call.

provider.description: Backend identifier. 'stub' before any backend is wired (Day-0/Day-1a). 'ollama:<model>' once OllamaAdapter is in the call path. Future cloud entries use 'cloud:<vendor>:<model>'.

capability.description: Capability id requested by the caller. Empty when the request was rejected by IllegalArgumentException before reaching the policy gate.

status.description: Canonical outcome token. ASCII-kebab so audit grep is locale-independent. The apply-plan-* family is emitted by ApplyPlanValidator (via applyPlanValidationStatus) when an ApplyPlan payload is refused before any document mutation.
